subjects.description: golden retriever puppy chasing a squeaky toy in a sunlit living room
subjects.appearance_details: fluffy bright eyed puppy with soft golden fur, quick paws, perked ears, and playful body language
subjects.relationship: primary animal subject playing alone with a toy
subjects.location: on the hardwood floor near a plush cream colored couch and scattered throw pillows
subjects.relative_size: small puppy scale, low to the floor and smaller than the couch
subjects.orientation: moving across the floor toward the bouncing toy
subjects.pose: springing forward with front paws lifted and tail active
subjects.action: bounces around and chases a colorful squeaky toy across the room
subjects.state_changes: toy skips across the floor, puppy pivots and hops, fur catches shifting sunlight
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: soft golden fur with warm sunlit texture
subjects.facial_features: bright eyes, small nose, open happy mouth, perked ears

background_setting: A cozy living room with hardwood floors, a plush cream colored couch, scattered warm throw pillows, a large framed family portrait on the wall, and sunlight filling the space.

lighting.conditions: Warm direct sunlight from a nearby window, soft room bounce, glowing highlights on fur, floor, couch fabric, and picture frame glass.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm direct sunlight from a nearby window, soft room bounce, glowing highlights on fur, floor, couch fabric, and picture frame glass.

aesthetics.composition: Cozy domestic joy, playful pet energy, warm upholstery, polished wood, and bright family home comfort.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Cozy domestic joy, playful pet energy, warm upholstery, polished wood, and bright family home comfort.

cinematography.camera_motion: Low handheld pet level tracking shot, quick but smooth movement following the puppy and toy with shallow depth of field.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Warm family home realism with soft highlights and energetic playful motion.
context: A golden retriever puppy plays freely in a comfortable sunlit living room.

actions.description: The colorful squeaky toy bounces onto the hardwood floor and the puppy springs after it.
The puppy darts around the couch, paws skittering as the toy skips and squeaks ahead.
The puppy catches up, noses the toy, and hops in place with bright excited eyes.

segments.description: Establish the sunlit living room and puppy spotting the bouncing toy.
segments.key_changes: Toy enters motion, puppy shifts from alert sitting to chase posture.
segments.camera: Low floor level angle facing the puppy and couch.

segments.description: Follow the energetic chase across the hardwood floor.
segments.key_changes: Puppy accelerates, pillows and couch slide through background, sunlight flashes on fur.
segments.camera: Quick pet level tracking with gentle handheld sway.

segments.description: End with the puppy engaging the toy near the couch.
segments.key_changes: Motion condenses into playful hops and nose taps, toy slows.
segments.camera: Small push in to a close playful view.

temporal_caption: A fluffy golden retriever puppy chases a colorful squeaky toy across a cozy sunlit living room.
audio_description: Tiny paws on hardwood, toy squeaks, puppy panting, soft room ambience, and faint fabric rustle from nearby pillows.
